strategy.notes: v2: sigma_scale 1.0 -> 0.55. Model claimed 78% avg on NO bets, realized 48.5% over 33 (4-sigma miscalibration); market-implied next-day sigma ~0.8C vs our 1.8C. Threshold unchanged.
